flow-definition.description: Publish signed Windows MSI files from Artifactory to GitHub<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SAPMACHINE_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The SapMachine Release Tag to upload MSI files artifacts for. Should start with "sapmachine-". E.g. "sapmachine-17.0.6".

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SOURCE_LOCATION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Artifactory location where SapMachine binaries should be taken from. URL likely needs to be modified.
